title: Just Enough Claymores
body:
Just Enough Claymores is a mod that adds Claymores to Minecraft!

A **claymore** is a type of **two-handed sword** that originated in Scotland, characterized by a long, broad, double-edged blade and a distinctive hilt with long quillons (crossguards) that often angle towards the blade and terminate in quatrefoils. The name "claymore" is derived from the Gaelic "claidheamh mòr," meaning "great sword". While the term is most commonly associated with this specific type of sword, it has also been used to describe other Scottish swords, including basket-hilted broadswords.

**THIS MOD REQUIRES BETTER COMBAT!** \
Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat

![Just Enough Claymores Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59a77cb7c521cf234c117e7bdace76260b638497.png)
